title: VascuTrace aggregate evidence ledger
scientific_warning: Research prototype. Trained and evaluated using simulated vascular-like abnormalities, not confirmed human post-angioplasty lesions.

allowed_claims: Image-domain synthetic-source detectability in healthy-control PET/CT backgrounds
evidence_policy.privacy: Aggregate values only. No subject identifier, case row, local absolute path, medical image, credential, model weight, or private development record is included.

primary_sources.supports: Test/retest design, PET and CT acquisition grids, segmentation software version, and NIfTI release description
Current public archive identity, version, size, and checksum

primary_sources.citation: Nabavinia et al., Annals of Biomedical Engineering (2026)
primary_sources.supports: Biological motivation from an eight-animal porcine femoral overdilation experiment at 14 days
primary_sources.limitation: Does not support a human clinical claim or model-validation claim

primary_sources.supports: Current clin_ct_cardiac inventory lists left and right iliac artery labels as 7 and 8
primary_sources.limitation: The local archive does not embed enough version metadata to prove archive-era label semantics independently

records.class: primary-source fact corroborated by historical aggregate audit
records.status: observed historically and supported by current public source
records.limitation: The publication turn did not reopen raw volumes
Treating the workbook field Scan [d] as the inter-session interval is an inference because no data dictionary was verified

records.class: primary-source fact corroborated by historical header audit
records.limitation: Valid headers and bounding-box overlap do not prove local anatomical alignment

records.population: PET sample from 12 subjects at both visits
records.independent_unit: voxel sample clustered within subject and visit
records.limitation: This is not a full-volume or vessel-corridor intensity distribution

records.population: CT sample from four subjects at both visits
records.independent_unit: voxel sample clustered within subject and visit
records.limitation: This is a corruption screen, not a tissue-specific distribution

records.class: historical aggregate measurement under provisional label semantics
records.limitation: Current public label documentation corroborates codes 7 and 8, but archive-era label identity was not independently pinned from embedded metadata

records.class: historical aggregate measurement and engineering decision
records.population: 96-session corridor audit and six-session crop receipt
records.limitation: The fixed crop is an engineering headroom choice, and the current reflection method does not match the intended frozen method
No acquisition-noise model is implemented, and stored CT-shift metadata was not applied in the standard training cache
The model output is a 2D center slice and its sigmoid value is uncalibrated

records.population: 208 validation center slices from 13 bundles and seven subject clusters
records.limitation: Not a sealed test result, scan-level result, native 3D result, or clinical result
The clean-rate interval included zero, and the comparison does not replace a promotion-compliant baseline evaluation

records.independent_unit: repeated center-slice observation clustered within seven subjects
records.limitation: Cells are small, observations repeat within subjects, and no unclustered inferential claim is made

records.independent_unit: repeated center-slice observation clustered within seven subjects
records.limitation: The proxy is derived from raw PET texture, not simulated acquisition noise, and clustered confirmatory inference was not performed

implementation_gaps.current: Per-slice iliac plus femur pairing with a plain mean normal and mean midpoint
implementation_gaps.intended: Iliac-only, arc-length-paired centerlines with a robust mean normal and median offset

implementation_gaps.current: CT-shift metadata exists but was not applied in the standard cache and training path
implementation_gaps.intended: Explicit CT-input-only registration stress with PET and labels fixed

implementation_gaps.current: Standalone threshold code lacks minimum physical component volume and uses a different positive-case component error definition
implementation_gaps.intended: Validation-only threshold freeze with sham and untouched activation, physical component volume, and the frozen tie rules

implementation_gaps.current: Exploratory 2D center-slice evaluation with 8-connectivity and best-IoU matching
implementation_gaps.intended: Native-space 3D stitching, 26-connectivity, intersection matching, and 5000 subject-cluster bootstrap replicates

implementation_gaps.current: Reference backend is the default; optional learned backend processes one cached validation slice; the 2D adapter computes raw target SUV only when valid and returns structured nulls with typed reasons for unavailable contralateral SUV, physical volume, and longitudinal extent
implementation_gaps.intended: Complete scan processing with the standalone 3D quantifier, physical geometry, structured nulls, and uncalibrated abnormality_score terminology

implementation_gaps.current: The default corpus builder reads only knowledge/research_corpus.json; audited documentation folders require explicit opt-in; the earlier local index remains excluded and no fresh public-corpus retrieval evaluation is reported
implementation_gaps.intended: Rebuild and reevaluate an index over public sources only before reporting retrieval performance

figure_provenance.kind: generated schematic with aggregate geometry labels

mandatory_limitations: Older archive provenance values were superseded by the current primary dataset record.
The crop reflection, threshold baseline, evaluator, and product quantification paths do not fully match the intended scientific contract.
No sealed native-space 3D test result exists.
Historical aggregate receipts were not rerun against raw medical volumes during this publication turn.
